character.name: crab
character.prompt: Late-20s Polish male junior lawyer, sturdy compact, short cropped mid-brown hair, square jaw, narrow eyes, rumpled navy suit jacket with sleeves pushed up, white shirt, oxblood tie loose at collar, dark trousers.
